Fields.Name: code
Fields.Description: Accepted, ignored, invalid or unavailable disposition.

Fields.Name: event_type
Fields.Description: Normalized event type without identifier data.

Fields.Name: aggregates
Fields.Description: Counts and bounded rates, not model truth or decisions.

Fields.Name: markers
Fields.Description: Descriptive and not automatic calibration markers.

Contracts.Justification: Audit records are integrity metadata for CGE durable operations.

Fields.Name: id
Fields.Description: Raw Core event ID at the non-persistent boundary.

Fields.Name: identity_and_references
Fields.Description: Raw Core identifiers; never durable in this form.

Contracts.Justification: Calibration records are append-only advisory ledger records.

Fields.Name: record_id_and_sequence
Fields.Description: Ledger record identity and append sequence.

Fields.Name: comparison_fingerprint
Fields.Description: Link to the compared historical and cognitive outputs.

Contracts.Justification: Cognitive situations are durable advisory workflow state.

Fields.Name: facts_and_hypotheses
Fields.Description: Consolidated descriptive model of current evidence.

Contracts.Justification: Context frame is persisted only as descriptive context attached to an observation.

Fields.Name: observation_id
Fields.Description: Observation to which the frame is attached.

Fields.Name: topology
Fields.Description: Node, parent and zone context needed for topology resolution.

Fields.Name: observation_and_admission_metrics
Fields.Description: Bounded event and admission counters without identifiers.

Fields.Name: workflow_and_recovery_status
Fields.Description: Read-only runtime, recovery and ledger status.

Fields.Name: authority_markers
Fields.Description: No action and historical authority unchanged markers.

Fields.Name: runtime_state
Fields.Description: Read-only feature, workflow and field-trial status.

Contracts.Justification: Episode snapshots are workflow durable working-memory state.

Fields.Name: observations
Fields.Description: Redacted observation references in the episode window.

Fields.Name: retryable
Fields.Description: Whether the caller may retry without changing authority.

Contracts.Justification: Evidence evaluations are durable derived evidence state.

Fields.Name: evidence_references
Fields.Description: Source observations and facts supporting the evaluation.

Contracts.Justification: Reserved read-only explanation shape; current pass exposes no decision or action content.

Fields.Name: availability_and_text
Fields.Description: Read-only availability and bounded explanation text.

Contracts.Justification: Fact sets are workflow durable derived state.

Fields.Name: facts
Fields.Description: Bounded normalized facts with quality and origin.

Fields.Name: source_observation_ids
Fields.Description: Protected observations supporting the fact set.

Contracts.Justification: Feedback is a CGE-owned durable input to calibration, not an automatic training command.

Fields.Name: source_reference
Fields.Description: Observation or comparison reference associated with feedback.

Fields.Name: value
Fields.Description: Validation signal; never an automatic training command.

Contracts.Justification: Exact v1 field-trial annotation envelope.
Exact v1 field-trial event envelope.
Exact v1 field-trial session manifest.
Field trial records are bounded CGE validation evidence.

Fields.Name: event_reference
Fields.Description: Redacted event reference in a trial record.

Contracts.Justification: Exact v1 active generation manifest payload.
Exact v1 generation snapshot payload.
Comparison is durable calibration material and never overrides historical authority.

Fields.Name: historical_reference
Fields.Description: Opaque reference to authoritative historical decision.

Contracts.Justification: Read-only historical decision reference crossing B12; it retains Core authority and is not a CGE decision.
Hypothesis sets are durable advisory model state.

Fields.Name: alternatives
Fields.Description: Competing interpretations and scores, not decisions.

Fields.Name: provenance
Fields.Description: Source schema, policy, revision and evaluation time.

Contracts.Justification: Exact v1 payload for chain.added.
Exact v1 payload for chain.contribution_added.
Exact v1 payload for journal.genesis; the journal envelope is validated separately.
Exact v1 payload for hypothesis.opened.
Exact v1 payload for hypothesis.rebased.
Exact v1 payload for hypothesis.resolved.
Exact v1 payload for hypothesis.status_changed.
Exact v1 payload for hypothesis.superseded.
Exact v1 payload for chain.lifecycle_transitioned.
Exact v1 payload for chain.observation_added.
Exact v1 root envelope for a durable CGE journal line.
Exact v1 payload for routine.created.
Exact v1 payload for routine.occurrence_added.
Exact v1 payload for routine.status_changed.
Exact v1 payload for snapshot.checkpointed.

Fields.Name: observed_at_and_count
Fields.Description: Read-only observation timestamp and aggregate count.

Fields.Name: last_event_type
Fields.Description: Last normalized event type without identifiers.

Contracts.Justification: Observation is a durable CGE boundary contract with protected identifiers.

Fields.Name: observation_id
Fields.Description: Stable protected reference for the source event.

Fields.Name: entity_id
Fields.Description: Protected known subject reference; absent for unknown subjects.

Fields.Name: clip_track_activation_sequence
Fields.Description: Protected media, tracking, activation and ordering references.

Fields.Name: observed_at
Fields.Description: Time at which the source observation occurred.

Contracts.Justification: Advisory output only; no automation consumer is permitted.

Fields.Name: recommendations
Fields.Description: Ranked advisory candidates, never commands or actions.

Fields.Name: warnings
Fields.Description: Bounded recovery warnings and fallback indicators.

Contracts.Justification: Exact v1 workflow checkpoint payload.
Workflow records are the versioned durable WAL envelope.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Disabled, recovering, running, degraded or stopped state.

Contracts.Justification: Historical Core/automation contract inventoried for authority separation; CGE is forbidden to produce it.

Fields.Name: request_id
Fields.Description: Action request identity outside CGE authority.

Fields.Name: command
Fields.Description: Executable action command; never a CGE output.

Fields.Name: timestamp
Fields.Description: Producer-reported event time; not receipt time.

Fields.Name: payload
Fields.Description: Typed event payload decoded by the historical Core.

Contracts.Justification: Adapter-only input; not a durable CGE contract.

Implementation.Justification: Adapter payload is owned by external sources.

Fields.Name: source_payload
Fields.Description: External source payload before contract validation.

Contracts.Justification: Historical Core decision is authoritative and separately owned.

Fields.Name: event_id
Fields.Description: Source event reference owned by historical Core.

Fields.Name: decided_at
Fields.Description: Time at which the historical decision was made.

Contracts.Justification: Historical Core state is the owner of this durable event representation.

Fields.Name: event_id
Fields.Description: Event identity used by historical Core ingestion.

Fields.Name: observed_at
Fields.Description: Time reported by the event, when present.
